requirement_topic.en: Enterprise Singapore CPSR and LTA EV Common Charger Grant Market Access
requirement_topic.zh: 企业发展局消费品安全要求（CPSR）与陆路交通管理局电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划市场准入
requirement_topic.zht: 企業發展局消費品安全要求（CPSR）與陸路交通管理局電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃市場准入

summary.en: Enterprise Singapore administers the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations (CPSR) under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Act, which designates certain electrical products as Controlled Goods requiring registration and the SAFETY Mark before they can be supplied in Singapore. EV chargers and EV supply equipment may fall within CPSR Controlled Goods scope depending on product classification, HS code, and rated voltage. Suppliers of Controlled Goods must register through an Enterprise Singapore-approved certification body, obtain a Certificate of Conformity against the relevant standard (which for electrical charging equipment references IEC or SS EN IEC standards), and affix the SAFETY Mark. LTA's EV Common Charger Grant provides funding to building owners and developers to install EV chargers in car parks; grant-funded chargers must comply with LTA's published technical specifications, which require IEC 62196-compliant connectors, OCPP capability, and IEC 61851-aligned safety evidence. Exporters must confirm both the CPSR Controlled Goods classification for their specific product and LTA grant eligibility before entering the Singapore market.
summary.zh: 企业发展局依据《消费品安全要求法》管理消费品安全要求条例（CPSR），将特定电气产品列为"管制商品"，要求在新加坡供应前完成注册并取得SAFETY Mark安全标志。电动汽车充电桩和电动汽车供电设备是否属于CPSR管制商品范围，取决于产品分类、HS编码和额定电压。管制商品供应商须通过企业发展局认可认证机构完成注册，取得相关标准（电气充电设备参照IEC或SS EN IEC标准）的合格证书，并加贴SAFETY Mark安全标志。陆路交通管理局电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划（EV Common Charger Grant）为建筑业主和开发商在停车场安装电动汽车充电桩提供资金支持；资助的充电桩须符合LTA发布的技术规格，要求IEC 62196合规接口、OCPP能力及IEC 61851安全证据。出口商在进入新加坡市场前，须确认其具体产品的CPSR管制商品分类及LTA资助资格。
summary.zht: 企業發展局依據《消費品安全要求法》管理消費品安全要求條例（CPSR），將特定電氣產品列為「管制商品」，要求在新加坡供應前完成登記並取得SAFETY Mark安全標誌。電動汽車充電樁和電動汽車供電設備是否屬於CPSR管制商品範圍，取決於產品分類、HS編碼和額定電壓。管制商品供應商須通過企業發展局認可認證機構完成登記，取得相關標準（電氣充電設備參照IEC或SS EN IEC標準）的合格證書，並加貼SAFETY Mark安全標誌。陸路交通管理局電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃（EV Common Charger Grant）為建築業主和開發商在停車場安裝電動汽車充電樁提供資金支持；資助的充電樁須符合LTA發布的技術規格，要求IEC 62196合規接口、OCPP能力及IEC 61851安全證據。出口商在進入新加坡市場前，須確認其具體產品的CPSR管制商品分類及LTA資助資格。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations (CPSR) — Enterprise Singapore (enterprisesg.gov.sg)
Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Act — Singapore Controlled Goods regime
LTA EV Common Charger Grant technical specifications (lta.gov.sg)
SS EN IEC 61851 / TR 25 — referenced standard for EV charging equipment CPSR conformity

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review during a CPSR or LTA conformity assessment, but it does not by itself establish Enterprise Singapore CPSR registration, SAFETY Mark entitlement, or LTA grant eligibility.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可在CPSR或LTA合格评定过程中支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明企业发展局CPSR注册资格、SAFETY Mark权利或LTA资助资格。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可在CPSR或LTA合格評定過程中支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明企業發展局CPSR登記資格、SAFETY Mark權利或LTA資助資格。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) determine whether the specific EV charger product and HS code falls within CPSR Controlled Goods scope with Enterprise Singapore or an accredited certification body; (2) if in scope, register the product and obtain the SAFETY Mark before supply in Singapore; (3) confirm LTA EV Common Charger Grant eligibility and technical specification compliance for grant-funded installations; (4) prepare IEC-family safety and EMC evidence, IEC 62196 connector documentation, OCPP compliance records, and English-language labelling. Do not assume that China CCC registration automatically satisfies CPSR registration or LTA grant conditions.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 向企业发展局或认可认证机构确认具体电动汽车充电桩产品及HS编码是否属于CPSR管制商品范围；(2) 如属于管制商品范围，在新加坡供应前完成产品注册并取得SAFETY Mark安全标志；(3) 确认LTA电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划资格及技术规格合规情况（针对资助安装）；(4) 准备IEC体系安全及电磁兼容证据、IEC 62196接口文件、OCPP合规记录及英文标签。不应假设中国CCC注册自动满足CPSR注册或LTA资助条件。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 向企業發展局或認可認證機構確認具體電動汽車充電樁產品及HS編碼是否屬於CPSR管制商品範圍；(2) 如屬於管制商品範圍，在新加坡供應前完成產品登記並取得SAFETY Mark安全標誌；(3) 確認LTA電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃資格及技術規格合規情況（針對資助安裝）；(4) 準備IEC體系安全及電磁兼容證據、IEC 62196接口文件、OCPP合規記錄及英文標籤。不應假設中國CCC登記自動滿足CPSR登記或LTA資助條件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — CPSR Controlled Goods registration is mandatory where the EV charger product is classified as Controlled Goods under Enterprise Singapore regulations; LTA grant technical compliance is mandatory for grant-funded installations; exact CPSR scope for EV chargers should be confirmed with Enterprise Singapore for the specific product and HS code
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not a CPSR SAFETY Mark or LTA grant substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Singapore market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the CPSR Controlled Goods classification for the specific product HS code with Enterprise Singapore, and address IEC safety and EMC evidence, English labelling, LTA grant technical specifications, and EMA LEW installation separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足新加坡市场准入。应向企业发展局核实具体产品HS编码的CPSR管制商品分类，并分别处理IEC安全及电磁兼容证据、英文标签、LTA资助技术规格和EMA持牌电气工人安装。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足新加坡市場准入。應向企業發展局核實具體產品HS編碼的CPSR管制商品分類，並分別處理IEC安全及電磁兼容證據、英文標籤、LTA資助技術規格和EMA持牌電氣工人安裝。

requirement_topic.en: Singapore EV Policy — Green Plan 2030 and LTA EV Charging Deployment Target
requirement_topic.zh: 新加坡电动汽车政策——绿色计划2030与陆路交通管理局电动汽车充电部署目标
requirement_topic.zht: 新加坡電動汽車政策——綠色計劃2030與陸路交通管理局電動汽車充電部署目標

summary.en: Singapore's EV adoption is driven by the Singapore Green Plan 2030, which targets all new car and taxi registrations to be of cleaner energy models from 2030, and LTA's Electric Vehicle Charging Programme, which targets 60,000 EV charging points by 2030. LTA administers the EV Common Charger Grant to co-fund installations in public car parks and private premises. The government-aligned EV push creates strong procurement demand for IEC-standard charging equipment, but does not automatically reduce conformity assessment (CPSR), LEW installation, or LTA grant technical compliance obligations for imported chargers.
summary.zh: 新加坡电动汽车推广由新加坡绿色计划2030推动，目标是从2030年起所有新注册轿车和出租车均采用清洁能源车型；以及陆路交通管理局（LTA）电动汽车充电计划，目标是到2030年建设60,000个电动汽车充电点。LTA通过电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划（EV Common Charger Grant）共同资助公共停车场和私人场所的安装。政府主导的电动汽车推广为IEC标准充电设备的采购创造了强劲需求，但不会自动减少进口充电桩的合格评定（CPSR）、持牌电气工人安装或LTA资助技术合规义务。
summary.zht: 新加坡電動汽車推廣由新加坡綠色計劃2030推動，目標是從2030年起所有新登記轎車和計程車均採用清潔能源車型；以及陸路交通管理局（LTA）電動汽車充電計劃，目標是到2030年建設60,000個電動汽車充電點。LTA通過電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃（EV Common Charger Grant）共同資助公共停車場和私人場所的安裝。政府主導的電動汽車推廣為IEC標準充電設備的採購創造了強勁需求，但不會自動減少進口充電樁的合格評定（CPSR）、持牌電氣工人安裝或LTA資助技術合規義務。

standards_or_laws: Singapore Green Plan 2030 — cleaner energy vehicle target (greenplan.gov.sg)
LTA Electric Vehicle Charging Programme — 60,000 EV charging points by 2030 (lta.gov.sg)
LTA EV Common Charger Grant — co-funding for EV charger installations
Ministry of Sustainability and the Environment — Singapore Green Plan coordination

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related state grid and charging-station standards. China's domestic push does not translate into automatic Singapore market access; Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy Singapore conformity (CPSR), connector (IEC 62196), grid installation (EMA LEW / SS 638), and LTA grant requirements even when their home-market volumes are large.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关国家电网和充电站标准管理。中国国内推广不能自动转换为新加坡市场准入；中国制造商即便国内销量很大，仍须单独满足新加坡合格评定（CPSR）、接口（IEC 62196）、电网安装（EMA持牌电气工人 / SS 638）和LTA资助要求。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關國家電網和充電站標準管理。中國國內推廣不能自動轉換為新加坡市場准入；中國製造商即便國內銷量很大，仍須單獨滿足新加坡合格評定（CPSR）、接口（IEC 62196）、電網安裝（EMA持牌電氣工人 / SS 638）和LTA資助要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Singapore's EV policy creates procurement opportunity but does not waive technical or conformity requirements. Chinese exporters should monitor LTA tender announcements on lta.gov.sg, confirm product CPSR classification with Enterprise Singapore, arrange EMA LEW installation partners, and allocate lead time for IEC testing, connector redesign to IEC 62196, CPSR SAFETY Mark registration, and LTA grant application before entering Singapore deployments.
gap.zh: 新加坡电动汽车政策创造了采购机会，但不豁免技术或合规评定要求。中国出口商应关注LTA在lta.gov.sg发布的招标公告，向企业发展局确认产品CPSR分类，安排EMA持牌电气工人安装合作方，并为IEC测试、接口重新设计至IEC 62196、CPSR SAFETY Mark注册及LTA资助申请预留交货期，再进入新加坡部署项目。
gap.zht: 新加坡電動汽車政策創造了採購機會，但不豁免技術或合規評定要求。中國出口商應關注LTA在lta.gov.sg發布的招標公告，向企業發展局確認產品CPSR分類，安排EMA持牌電氣工人安裝合作方，並為IEC測試、接口重新設計至IEC 62196、CPSR SAFETY Mark登記及LTA資助申請預留交貨期，再進入新加坡部署項目。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity requirements under EMA, Enterprise Singapore CPSR, and LTA remain in force independently
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Singapore conformity obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore's EV strategy creates real procurement demand for IEC-standard chargers. Chinese exporters should treat the policy as a market signal, not a conformity shortcut, and ensure CPSR registration, IEC 62196 connector compliance, EMA LEW installation, and LTA grant documentation are each addressed before entering Singapore deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡电动汽车战略为IEC标准充电桩创造了真实采购需求。中国出口商应将该政策视为市场信号而非合规捷径，在进入新加坡部署项目前，确保CPSR注册、IEC 62196接口合规、EMA持牌电气工人安装和LTA资助文件各项均已妥善处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡電動汽車戰略為IEC標準充電樁創造了真實採購需求。中國出口商應將該政策視為市場信號而非合規捷徑，在進入新加坡部署項目前，確保CPSR登記、IEC 62196接口合規、EMA持牌電氣工人安裝和LTA資助文件各項均已妥善處理。
